# Chapter 19: Software engineering as discipline  (~110 pp)
- 19.1 What software engineering is (12) · 19.2 Version control and change discipline (12) · 19.3 Testing: unit, integration, property, fuzz (18) · 19.4 Code review (10) · 19.5 CI/CD (12) · 19.6 Deployment, observability, incident response (18) · 19.7 Software architecture: monoliths, services, modular design (15) · 19.8 Failure section: production incidents that started as PR comments dismissed (13)

**Archetype**: ethics, control, failure. **Project**: ship a small project end-to-end with tests, CI, deployment, monitoring. **Exercises**: 25.
